name: PARennial Golf - Wicker Park
about: PARennial Golf is a premium indoor golf simulator venue located in Chicago, offering a high-tech golfing experience with Trackman technology. The facilities are designed to provide an environment that is second only to being on a real golf course, featuring multiple locations including Wicker Park, West Loop, and Lincoln Park. The venue offers a seamless experience through a mobile app that allows for real-time bay availability checks, easy booking, and 24/7 access for members. Players can enjoy a variety of virtual courses and personalized settings in each bay, with the option to book in advance or walk in depending on membership status.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate shot data and a realistic golf experience
Mobile app offers real-time bay availability and easy booking for convenience
24/7 walk-in access for members with no booking required
Access to a wide variety of world-renowned virtual golf courses
PGA professional instruction available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar mentioned, BYOB policy not specified

faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.answer: No information is provided on outside food or drinks policy. Please check with the venue directly.

faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but it depends on your pace of play and bay availability.

faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly policies or features is provided.
